body: Tuskegee had a battle with Moss Point High School and lost. It was their first time on the Mississippi Gulf Coast during the battle of the bands on MLK Day. They were so excited to see the high school battling with the Universities. It was awesome to watch the excitement and the way they were rooting for the youngsters

title: Tuskegee University Worst School?!
body: THAT! was a great way to get views!! applause!! I loved my time there in the late 1980's. Back then there used to be a Walmart in town. Coming from northern Indiana, We had never even heard of a Walmart back then, until we got to Tuskegee...lol!!!
author: @jeffjones9689

title: Tuskegee University Worst School?!
body: My favorite teacher/ biggest example of black excellence in my life went to Tuskegee! She says a lot how much she loved it, she is soul reason I am even looking into the school. Great video.
author: @shanti6888

title: Tuskegee University Worst School?!
body: Loved your Vid. What's was true 5 years ago was true 30 years ago when I finished. (Business House - Finance). And is true today. The struggle is real. Amazingly you learn so much and that struggle prepares you for the real world. Can't  tell you how many times I've said. They must not know I went to Skegee.....We are a special breed. It's a forever ❤️ love. Homecoming just stop! For an area so remote it's ridiculous how all come back. The locals, whether you didn't finish, alumnus.....if you were ever Skegee you are always Skegee.....U Know.
author: @WontHe5786

title: Tuskegee University Worst School?!
body: Had me like whaaa for a min cause I rock with Skegee hard. But you ain't lyin that struggle is real but allows for so much growth.
author: @ashanticoffey6517

title: Booker T. Washington: Founder of Tuskegee University & Champion for Civil Rights | Biography
body: Up From Slavery by Washington should be required reading for African Americans.  It is a beautiful story of perseverance and success.  Truly he was an American Treasure.
author: @cindyrolle6476

title: Booker T. Washington: Founder of Tuskegee University & Champion for Civil Rights | Biography
body:
Am a Zambian, I read about Booker.T. Washington and George Washington Carver from the Martin Luther king Memorial Library in Lusaka Zambia about 20 years ago.
Their stories have left a lasting impression on me as an African.
Their is alot Africa and the Diaspora can learn from these two selfless African- American men.
Their stories form the content of Africa and African-American History which should be taught in African and African-Americans school systems.
author: @raymondphiri7925

title: Booker T. Washington: Founder of Tuskegee University & Champion for Civil Rights | Biography
body: Did you know that when Booker T. Washington was 16 year-old he had to walk 500 miles to go to the collage in Hampton. He also had to sleep under a wooden sidewalk when he is going to Hamton.
author: @yuyili3349

title: Booker T. Washington: Founder of Tuskegee University & Champion for Civil Rights | Biography
body: Great American hero. Booker t Washington was a doer and extremely practical. His plan today would still work today for black people. Very intelligent man.
author: @Anthony039169

title: Booker T. Washington: Founder of Tuskegee University & Champion for Civil Rights | Biography
body: Truth is, our circumstance as Black People, as a whole, is a multi-level one. On some levels we need a Booker T approach, others we need Malcolm, others we need Garvey...MLK, etc.. EQUATING the entire rise. We fail as a people bcuz we take sides. Sides are PIECES OF THE PUZZLE, we need the WHOLE...They ALL were right! we just haven't found out how to UNITE our differences of approach!  UNITY should be OUR religion to reach God or we'll continue to fall, scattered, under the devil & arguing...
author: @TheAfricanKillerBs

title: Booker T. Washington: Founder of Tuskegee University & Champion for Civil Rights | Biography
body: Booker T pushing us away from distraction of politics and to be concerned with our economics, because political change always takes eons. Dubois want us to disregard our economic standing and fight for rights. Booker T’s message pushes on onward regardless, beautiful.
author: @Dispondent

title: Booker T. Washington: Founder of Tuskegee University & Champion for Civil Rights | Biography
body: When I was in Black History class in college it was a very cool interesting experience...we studied a bit about the economical development of African Americans.    Holy ghost.  Terrill T.C a.k.a Relic
author: @HOLYLIFEIFY

title: Booker T. Washington: Founder of Tuskegee University & Champion for Civil Rights | Biography
body: there are too many distortions in this presentations, 1. Dr. Washington did not take over a newly built Tuskegee University, Dr. Washington was summoned to Tuskegee and built Tuskegee Industrial and Normal Institute out of nothing.
author: @williamcraft9923

title: Booker T. Washington: Founder of Tuskegee University & Champion for Civil Rights | Biography
body: Well. My favorite black history figure. I think his message is still relevant today. We could all learn a great deal from Booker T Washington. 🙂
author: @ChristianEdwards-i9r

title: DAY IN THE LIFE OF A VET STUDENT: ophthalmology lab + studying for finals 👀
body:
Happy Tuesday!!! I hope you all enjoy todays video!! 👀

Here are the procedures we practiced:
😷Temoprary Tacking Sutures: placed in cases of entropion that can’t go to surgery right away

😷 Temporary Tarsorraphy: performed in cases of proptosis where the eye is determined to be viable

😷 Hotz-Celsus: correction of simple entropion

😷 Wedge Resection: removal of small eyelid masses

😷 Trans-Palpebral Enucleation: removal of the ocular globe when eyelid, conjunctival or corneal disease is apparent
author: @yourvetamanda

title: DAY IN THE LIFE OF A VET STUDENT: ophthalmology lab + studying for finals 👀
body: It's been my dream to be a veterinary surgeon since I was about 2 or 3. I'm 15 now and I just clicked on this video and started smiling like an idiot because I love seeing that girls like me who always wanted to be vets can grow up and achieve their dreams. thanks for making these videos!!

title: DAY IN THE LIFE OF A VET STUDENT: ophthalmology lab + studying for finals 👀
body: SO cool to hear you talk about all the ophthalmology procedures - the pictures were definitely helpful. I found out about a month ago I got into my top-choice for vet school, so I can't believe I'll be doing those procedures in just a few years! Good luck with finals! Will you be doing a video about how you went about picking your 4th year rotations?

title: DAY IN THE LIFE OF A VET STUDENT: ophthalmology lab + studying for finals 👀
body: I've had big dreams of becoming a veterinary surgeon since I was I think 2, and when I was only 10 or 11 I set my heart on at least trying to get a dog during university/grad school, and for the past 5 years, I've been taking vet courses online, but people are still always saying that it's a lot to ask for. I know that it's a lot to ask for, but I'm still going to try. These videos show me that it is possible and they encourage me to keep following my dreams.
